failure_mode: Feature-space novelty can rank a small high-contrast mark above a larger low-contrast defect.
intervention: Add a calibrated severity target and validation layer instead of treating PatchCore distance as severity.
key_lesson: A high anomaly score is not automatically a high engineering severity.
model: PatchCore-style nearest-neighbour memory bank with colour/texture patch features.
remaining_caveats: Synthetic scratch sweep, not a production severity benchmark.
No calibrated regression or ordinal severity model yet.
task: Synthetic severity sweep comparing scratch area with PatchCore-style novelty score.
title: Demo 06 - PatchCore Severity Mismatch
